title: ViaVersion Texture Fix (VVTF)
description:
WARNING: THIS PAGE IS REAL, AND I UPLOAD ONLY ON MODRINTH!

Resource pack adds items from new versions! Work on servers.
Adds items, mobs, blocks.
You need versions 1.12.2 or 1.8.9 (OPTIFINE!)
body: Resource pack for servers that adds items, mobs, blocks from 1.13-1.21 to versions 1.8.9 and 1.12.2! Only works on servers.
